nodes.label: robots.txt Crawl Policy (Allow all, Sitemap: augz.uz)
nodes.norm_label: robots.txt crawl policy (allow all, sitemap: augz.uz)

nodes.label: AUGZ Logo SVG (vector image asset)
nodes.rationale: SVG with pattern fill referencing an image; used as the primary brand logo for the AUGZ procurement association website

nodes.label: Favicon 16x16 (AUGZ orange temple icon)
nodes.rationale: Small browser tab icon showing the AUGZ temple motif on an orange/amber circle background at 16x16 pixels

nodes.label: Favicon 32x32 (AUGZ orange temple icon)
nodes.rationale: Browser tab icon showing the AUGZ temple motif (Cyrillic АУГЗ letters with classical columns) on an orange/amber circle background at 32x32 pixels

nodes.label: Android Chrome Icon 192x192 (AUGZ orange temple)
nodes.rationale: PWA/Android home screen icon showing the white AUGZ temple logo (Cyrillic АУГЗ with classical Greek columns and pediment) on a warm orange/amber circular background, 192x192px

nodes.label: Android Chrome Icon 512x512 (AUGZ orange temple)
nodes.rationale: High-resolution PWA splash/icon showing the white AUGZ temple logo (Cyrillic АУГЗ text integrated into classical Greek temple architecture) on an orange/amber circular background, 512x512px

nodes.label: Apple Touch Icon (AUGZ orange temple, iOS)
nodes.rationale: iOS home screen icon for the AUGZ website, showing the white temple motif with Cyrillic АУГЗ lettering on an orange/amber circular background
nodes.norm_label: apple touch icon (augz orange temple, ios)

nodes.label: OG Default Image (AUGZ grey temple branding)
nodes.rationale: Open Graph social sharing image: light grey background with diagonal stripe accents and decorative rounded shapes in corners; centered grey temple logo with Cyrillic АУГЗ text integrated into classical columns and pediment. Used as default OG image when sharing augz.uz links on social media.
nodes.norm_label: og default image (augz grey temple branding)

nodes.label: OG Default JPG (placeholder/corrupted file)
nodes.rationale: File exists at og-default.jpg but contains placeholder bytes rather than valid image data; likely a placeholder or download artifact

nodes.label: AUGZ Brand Identity (temple motif, orange, Cyrillic)
nodes.rationale: The consistent visual identity across all icons and OG images: Cyrillic АУГЗ letters integrated into a classical Greek temple/column motif, rendered in white on an orange/amber background for app icons, or grey on light grey for the OG image
nodes.norm_label: augz brand identity (temple motif, orange, cyrillic)

nodes.label: PWA Icon Set (multi-resolution icons for web app manifest)
nodes.rationale: Collection of android-chrome-192x192.png, android-chrome-512x512.png, apple-touch-icon.png, favicon-16x16.png, favicon-32x32.png — forms the complete icon set required for PWA and browser support
nodes.norm_label: pwa icon set (multi-resolution icons for web app manifest)

nodes.label: SEO Metadata (robots.txt + OG image + sitemap)
nodes.rationale: The combination of robots.txt (allow all crawlers, reference sitemap), og-default image, and sitemap.xml URL form the SEO/discoverability layer of the augz.uz site
